name: Sweet Potato Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the mashed cooked sweet potato with an electric mixer until well combined.
2. Add white sugar, salt, vanilla extract, melted margarine, and half and half to the bowl. Mix thoroughly.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and continue beating until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Pour the batter into a greased souffle dish, filling it to the top.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
6. While the souffle is baking, prepare the topping by mixing brown sugar, chopped pecans, flour, and coconut flakes in a bowl until evenly distributed.
7. Drizzle melted margarine over the topping mixture and toss gently to coat all ingredients.
8. Remove the souffle from the oven and sprinkle the prepared topping evenly over the top of the souffle.
9. Return the souffle to the oven for an additional 15 minutes, or until the topping begins to brown slightly.
10. Serve the sweet potato souffle hot, garnished with any remaining topping, for up to 8 servings.
